fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code. This field is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the language that is used when translating specified text on documents to foreign business partner, such as an item description on an order confirmation.

fields.name: Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the caption that is shown next to the y-axis to describe the selected measure.

fields.name: Language Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the language of the measure caption that is shown next to the y-axis of the generic chart.
